name: Maryland-Style Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently blend all ingredients together, except the butter.
2. Shape into 8-10 crab cakes and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Melt the butter in a large skillet.
4. Sauté the crab cakes until golden brown on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Serve with lemon wedges or an appropriate sauce.
